title: Consultation on biocides fee proposal - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on biocides fee proposal
Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from May 7 to July 16, 2022.
The Notice of Intent in the Canada Gazette, Part I provided interested stakeholders with the opportunity to comment on Health Canada's fee proposal for biocides products.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
Health Canada engaged with Canadians, including:
- Stakeholders in the biocides industry, including those in the disinfectant and sanitizer sectors
- Other interested members of the public

## Key issues discussed
The Notice of Intent touched on the following issues under the proposed Biocides Regulations:
- Proposed fees for biocides product applications
- Performance standards for biocides product applications
The input gathered through this process will be used to inform the final fee structure for biocides.
- Notice of Intent to Consult
- Funding and Fees Webpage
- Biocides Regulations for consultation
Mail: Resource Management and Operations Directorate Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada Graham Spry Building 250 Lanark Avenue Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9 Email: CRO-BRC@hc-sc.gc.ca
